hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$path = ($env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH -replace '\\','/'); if ($path -match 'apps/web/.*\.tsx$') { Write-Output '[HARNESS] Design system check: use globals.css tokens, rounded-lg, Sora font. No bg-white/text-gray-*/bg-blue-*/rounded-2xl. Read DESIGN.md if unsure.' }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$path = ($env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH -replace '\\','/'); if ($path -match 'db/migration/V[0-9].*\.sql$') { Write-Output '[HARNESS] WARNING: Flyway migrations are APPEND-ONLY. Never modify existing migration files. Only create new V{n+1}__ files.' }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$path = ($env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH -replace '\\','/'); if ($path -match 'apps/web/.*\.(ts|tsx)$') { Set-Location 'apps/web'; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30 }"
